home.heroSub:
Domestic & international trade and service of plastic raw materials
Commodity · Engineering · Modified · Imported · Rubber
home.aboutTitle:
A Professional Trading Service Provider
Focused on Plastic Materials
home.aboutP1: Qinbo New Materials operates two entities — Shanghai Qinbo and Haikou Qinbo — specializing in the sales and service of plastic raw materials (including rubber). Our business covers domestic trade and international import/export, along with imported resin distribution and modified-material customization.
home.aboutP2: Backed by a stable supply-chain network and strict quality management, we build long-term, trustworthy partnerships with downstream manufacturers through reliable supply and professional technical service.
home.productsTitle: A Product Line Covering Multiple Material Fields
home.tradeP: Qinbo cultivates both the domestic market and international trade, with imported-resin distribution capability that connects overseas sources to domestic customers end to end.
home.tradeLi1: Domestic Trade Covering East and South China core regions, fast response and flexible allocation
home.tradeLi2: Import/Export Partnering with quality overseas suppliers, legitimate channels and stable supply
home.tradeLi3: One-Stop Service Material selection, quotation, logistics and technical support in full coordination
home.strengthTitle: Earning Trust Through Scale and Service
home.ctaTitle: Looking for a Reliable Plastic Raw Material Partner?
home.ctaSub: Whether domestic procurement or imported materials, Qinbo provides professional support.

source.d: Multi-channel supply chain at home and abroad, with stable prices and lead times.

quality.d: Strict incoming inspection and quality-traceability system.

tech.d: A professional team providing material selection and application support.

service.d: Fast quotation and response, flexibly meeting customer needs.

general.name: Commodity Plastics
general.brief: Commodity resins such as PP, PE, PVC, PS and ABS, used in packaging, daily goods and appliances.

engineering.name: Engineering Plastics
engineering.brief: High-performance engineering plastics such as PA, PC, POM and PBT for automotive, electronics and machinery.

modified.name: Modified Materials
modified.brief: Customized modified plastics — reinforced, flame-retardant, toughened — with formulations on demand.

import.name: Imported Resins
import.brief: Imported resin distribution from Europe, the US, Japan, Korea and the Middle East, with stable supply and legitimate channels.

rubber.name: Rubber Materials
rubber.brief: Various synthetic rubbers and rubber-product raw materials for industry, automotive and sealing applications.

eco.name: Eco & Recycled
eco.brief: Eco-friendly recycled and biodegradable materials, helping customers reach green and sustainability goals.

products.bannerSub: A product line covering multiple material fields
products.ctaSub: Tell us your requirements and we will match the right material solution for you.
products.descGeneral: Bulk commodity resins widely used in packaging, daily necessities, appliance housings and pipes — stable supply, full range of specifications.
products.descEngineering: High-performance engineering plastics with excellent mechanical, heat- and chemical-resistance properties for demanding automotive, electronics and precision-machinery applications.
products.descModified: Functional modified plastics customized to client needs, offering reinforcement, flame-retardant, toughening, weathering and other modification solutions and formulation services.
products.descImport: Partnering with quality overseas suppliers in Europe, the US, Japan, Korea and the Middle East, providing imported resin distribution through legitimate channels with reliable quality and complete documentation.
products.descRubber: Various synthetic rubbers and rubber-product raw materials serving industrial products, automotive parts and sealing components.
products.descEco: Eco-friendly recycled and biodegradable materials in line with green-development trends, helping customers meet sustainability and environmental-compliance goals.

about.bannerSub: A professional trading service provider focused on plastic materials
about.introTitle: Connecting a Better Future Through Materials
about.introP1: Qinbo New Materials is a professional trading company focused on the sales and service of plastic raw materials (including rubber), operating two entities — Shanghai Qinbo and Haikou Qinbo.
about.introP2: Our business covers domestic trade and international import/export, with categories spanning commodity plastics, engineering plastics, modified materials, imported resins and rubber, providing downstream manufacturers with a reliable material supply chain and professional material-selection support.
about.introP3: We consistently build long-term, trustworthy partnerships through stable supply, reliable quality and efficient response.
about.shDesc: Based in the core Yangtze River Delta market, serving as the East-China operations and international-trade hub, connecting quality suppliers at home and abroad.
about.hkDesc: Leveraging South China and Free Trade Port advantages to expand import/export business and regional distribution, strengthening supply-chain resilience.
about.ctaTitle: Looking Forward to a Long-Term Partnership
about.ctaSub: Discover the material support Qinbo can provide for your business.

trade.domP: Backed by its Shanghai and Haikou dual bases, Qinbo has built a flexible, efficient distribution system across East and South China core markets, quickly responding to procurement and allocation needs.
trade.domLi1: Regional Coverage East and South China core manufacturing clusters
trade.domLi2: Flexible Allocation From small batches to bulk procurement, supplied on demand
trade.domLi3: Fast Delivery Localized inventory and logistics coordination
trade.intlP: Qinbo has mature import/export capabilities, partnering with quality overseas suppliers in Europe, the US, Japan, Korea and the Middle East to provide imported resin distribution through legitimate channels, with complete documentation and reliable quality.
trade.intlLi1: Import Distribution Genuine OEM resins through legitimate, traceable channels
trade.intlLi2: Customs & Logistics Full import/export process and documentation service
trade.intlLi3: Stable Supply Long-term overseas partnerships and continuous supply
trade.flowTitle: Full-Process Coordination from Selection to Delivery
trade.flow1d: Understanding applications and technical requirements to match materials precisely.
trade.flow2d: Offering grade recommendations and competitive quotations.
trade.flow3d: Domestic distribution and import customs clearance, delivered on schedule.
trade.flow4d: Ongoing technical and supply assurance for long-term cooperation.
trade.ctaTitle: Need Imported Materials or Domestic Procurement?
trade.ctaSub: Qinbo's trade team is ready to provide professional support.
